mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, image_id, description, category, meal_type, difficulty, cooking_time, story, sort, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM recipe WHERE id = #{recipeId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE recipe
title = #{req.title}, description = #{req.description}, category = #{req.category}, meal_type = #{req.mealType}, difficulty = #{req.difficulty}, cooking_time = #{req.cookingTime}, story = #{req.story}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{recipeId} AND deleted = 0

update.foreach:
UPDATE recipe
title = #{item.title}, description = #{item.description}, category = #{item.category}, meal_type = #{item.mealType}, difficulty = #{item.difficulty}, cooking_time = #{item.cookingTime}, story = #{item.story}, sort = #{item.sort}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{item.id} AND deleted = 0

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM recipe WHERE deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}

SELECT FROM recipe
ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC, id DESC
